title: Button column available in sub-element columns
excerpt: I think it would be a good idea if Button type columns were available in the sub-item columns. Do you think this could be possible?

posts.author: Serge (Rebuffat)
posts.cookedHtml: I think it would be a good idea if Button type columns were available in the sub-item columns. Do you think this could be possible?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: That’s a great suggestion! Have you put it on the feature suggestion board? Feature requests - monday Community Forum

posts.author: Zaur158 (Zaur)
posts.cookedHtml:
Yeah, that’s a solid idea — having Button columns in sub-items would make workflows a lot smoother, especially when each sub-task needs its own quick action. Right now, it’s definitely a gap.

Until they roll that out, using a status column with an automation trigger is probably the closest workaround, but I’d love to see native Button support down there too.

posts.author: Serge (Rebuffat)
posts.cookedHtml: No, I m beginner in the community, you can transfert the post ?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: I don’t work for monday, so I wouldn’t be able to do that.
